sections.title: Use of the service
paragraphs: By using El Travieso you agree to these terms. You must be of legal drinking age in your jurisdiction.

sections.title: Purchases
paragraphs: Product prices, availability and shipping terms are shown at checkout. Stripe processes payments securely.

sections.title: User content
paragraphs: Recipes, blog posts and forum content you publish remain your responsibility. We may moderate content that violates the law or these terms.
